mapper.select: SELECT P.PRODUCT_NO, P.PRODUCT_NAME,P.PRODUCT_DETAILS, P.ORIGINAL_PRICE, P.IMG_URL, P.PRO_TYPE FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NO = C.COMPANY_NO WHERE C.USER_ID = #{userid} AND PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
SELECT P.PRODUCT_NO, P.PRODUCT_NAME,P.PRODUCT_DETAILS, P.ORIGINAL_PRICE, P.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NO = C.COMPANY_NO WHERE C.USER_ID = #{userid};
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT SET PRODUCT_NAME = #{productName}, PRODUCT_DETAILS = #{productDetails}, ORIGINAL_PRICE = #{originalPrice}, IMG_URL = #{imgUrl}, PRO_TYPE = #{proType} WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT(PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_DETAILS, ORIGINAL_PRICE, IMG_URL, PRO_TYPE, COMPANY_NO) VALUES(#{productName}, #{productDetails}, #{originalPrice}, #{imgUrl}, #{proType}, #{companyNo})
mapper.select: SELECT r.user_id AS res_user_id, -- 실제 예약한 유저의 아이디 r.product_no, p.product_name, r.res_date, r.res_content, r.use_datetime, r.deposit, m.tel FROM company c -- 1. 업체 테이블과 상품 테이블 연결 (이 업체가 가진 상품들) JOIN product p ON c.company_no = p.company_no -- 2. 상품 테이블과 예약 테이블 연결 (그 상품들에 들어온 예약들) JOIN reservation r ON p.product_no = r.product_no -- 3. 조건: 업체 테이블의 로그인 아이디가 'sunsu09'인 경우 left join member m on m.user_id = r.user_id -- WHERE c.user_id = 'sunsu09'

select p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url, count(review_no) reviewCount from product p left join review r on p.product_no = r.product_no and r.is_paid = 1 where p.company_no = ( select company_no cmpNo from company c where c.user_id = 'sunsu09') group by p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url;

select p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url, count(review_no) reviewCount from product p left join review r on p.product_no = r.product_no and r.is_paid = 0 where p.company_no = ( select company_no cmpNo from company c where c.user_id = 'sunsu09') group by p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url;
